summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Driver Gig CRM visual redesign. All core functionality verified with excellent results. Visual redesign successfully implemented with warm cream backgrounds, correct status badge colors, and navy styling elements.
passed_tests: Login functionality with test@example.com / Test123! - 100% success
Dashboard page loads with 4 KPI cards - Active Gigs card has correct navy background (rgb(30, 45, 90))
Companies page shows table with 10 companies as expected
Status badge colors verified - all 5 status types match exact specifications:
- Researching: rgb(227, 242, 253) with text rgb(21, 101, 192)
- Applied: rgb(255, 249, 196) with text rgb(245, 127, 23)
- Waiting: rgb(255, 224, 178) with text rgb(230, 81, 0)
- Offered: rgb(200, 230, 201) with text rgb(46, 125, 50)
- Active: rgb(165, 214, 167) with text rgb(27, 94, 32)
Company Profile Drawer opens with all required sections:
- Company Contact, Company Personnel, Work Model, Service Type
- Vehicles Accepted, Active States, AI Recommendation, Documents, Work Model Key
Add Company modal opens with correct warm cream background (rgb(240, 236, 228))
Add Company modal contains all required form sections and functionality
Save Changes button in drawer shows correct disabled/enabled states
Pipeline page loads and displays Kanban board elements
Activity Log page loads with activity table
Settings page accessible and loads properly
Sidebar navigation works across all pages
Visual redesign elements properly implemented:
- Warm cream backgrounds (#e8e4dc, #f0ece4)
- White cards with #e2ddd6 borders
- Navy Active Gigs KPI card
- Bold navy typography and buttons
